creator: loic.blot@unix-experience.fr
text:
Rainloop is a beautiful and powerful webmail written in PHP.

I have ported rainloop as a FreeBSD port. Sources can be found there: 

https://github.com/nerzhul/MiscScripts/tree/master/FreeBSD-port/rainloop

If you have any questions, please tell me.

Have a nice day.

L.B. UNIX Engineer
